## Test plan
- [ ] `cargo test --no-default-features` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --no-default-features -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] Tried against a local node (if the change touches sync/ledger)

## Checklist
- [ ] Linked to an issue (for non-trivial changes)
- [ ] README / config.example.toml updated if public behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets or personal data in the diff
